description: A financial statement detailing the usage, sales, and corresponding royalty earnings generated from intellectual property or resource rights.

first_name.instruction: First name of the royalty recipient.

last_name.instruction: Last name of the royalty recipient.

recipient_ssn.instruction: Social Security Number of the recipient. Reformat as XXX-XX-XXXX.

payer_name.instruction: Name of the publisher, studio, distributor, or corporation paying out the royalties.

royalties_amount.instruction: Total royalty income amount for the period.

payment_frequency.instruction: Frequency of royalty payments (monthly, quarterly, annually).

payment_period_start.instruction: Start of the reporting period. YYYY-MM-DD format.

payment_period_end.instruction: End of the reporting period. YYYY-MM-DD format.

property_or_work_title.instruction: The name of the specific book, song, album, patent, or asset generating the royalty earnings.

document_date.instruction: Date the statement was issued. YYYY-MM-DD format.
